thresholds.threshold_source: Operational starting heuristics from temp/null_handling_recommendations.md §1.2; <5% MCAR boundary citation: Schafer & Graham 2002; warning against rigid global thresholds: van Buuren 2018

override_priority: 3. _recommend() per spec/fallback (incl. CONVERT_SENTINEL_TO_NULL for sentinel-only low-rate cases)
4. Target-column post-step (col in target_cols AND n_total_missing > 0) → recommendation=EXCLUDE_TARGET_NULL_ROWS

MMR.justification: MAR-primary: missingness depends on observed replay source (tournament replays lack ladder MMR). MNAR (private pro accounts) documented as sensitivity branch. Source: 01_03_01 cleaning_registry + temp/null_handling_recommendations.md §4.1.

highestLeague.justification: Tournament replays lack league exposure data. Source: 01_02_04 census top-N.

clanTag.justification: Not all players are in clans. Source: domain knowledge + 01_02_04 distribution.

selectedRace.justification: Empty string = Random race; resolved post-game. VIEWs convert to 'Random'. Source: 01_03_02.

gd_mapSizeX.justification: Parse artifact (273 replays). Not correlated with outcome. Source: 01_02_04 + 01_03_01.

gd_mapSizeY.justification: Same parse artifact as gd_mapSizeX (same 273 replays).

gd_mapAuthorName.justification: Map metadata not parsed for all replays. Likely non-predictive.

handicap.justification: Standard handicap=100; 2 anomalous rows have 0. Source: 01_02_04.

SQ.justification: INT32_MIN sentinel = parse failure (2 rows). Source: 01_03_01.

APM.justification: APM=0 correlates with selectedRace='' (97.9% overlap). Documentation-only in 01_04_01 — not converted to NULL. In-game; not in matches_flat_clean.

go_advancedSharedControl.justification: Game option metadata; cardinality from 01_02_04 to be confirmed at audit runtime. Constants-detection branch overrides if n_distinct=1.

go_amm.justification: Game option metadata; constants-detection backstop applies.

go_battleNet.justification: Game option metadata; constants-detection backstop applies.

go_clientDebugFlags.justification: Game option metadata; constants-detection backstop applies.

decisions_surfaced.question: Convert MMR=0 to NULL and drop the column from matches_flat_clean (per Rule S4 / >80%), OR retain MMR=0 as an explicit 'unranked' categorical encoding alongside is_mmr_missing, OR run the analysis on the rated subset only as a sensitivity arm?
Drop the column entirely (Rule S4 / >50% non-primary), OR retain 'Unknown' as its own category (Phase 02 decides if predictive)?
Drop the column (likely non-predictive at this rate), OR retain as a derived is_in_clan boolean only?
How should NULL-target rows in player_history_all be handled when computing player history features (e.g., expanding-window win-rate)? Drop these rows, mark as DRAW, or retain with NaN target?
Already converted to 'Random' in VIEWs (PR predecessor); audit confirms zero residual empty-string occurrences in the cleaned VIEWs.
VIEWs already CASE-WHEN to NULL (PR predecessor); audit confirms ledger reports the converted NULLs, not the original sentinel.
Drop column on grounds of being a non-predictive metadata field even before missingness considered? Decision deferred to 01_04_02+.

decisions_surfaced.column: go_* constants surfaced by runtime constants-detection
decisions_surfaced.question: Confirm the runtime constants-detection branch reports n_distinct=1 for the go_* columns flagged in 01_03_03. Drop these per Rule S4 / N/A-mechanism in 01_04_02+?

NULLIF the 2 anomalous handicap=0 rows + listwise deletion per Rule S3 (negligible rate), OR retain 0 as an explicit is_anomalous_handicap flag? NOTE: carries_semantic_content=True; CONVERT_SENTINEL_TO_NULL recommendation is non-binding.

decisions_surfaced.column: APM in player_history_all (sentinel=0, ~2.53%; 97.9% overlap with selectedRace='')
decisions_surfaced.question: Convert APM=0 to NULL via NULLIF in 01_04_02+ (per audit recommendation) OR retain APM=0 as a categorical encoding for 'extremely short / unparseable game'? NOTE: carries_semantic_content=True; recommendation is non-binding.
